seoTitle: Adelaide Lead vs Agnes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Adelaide Lead and Agnes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Adelaide Lead vs Agnes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Adelaide Lead and Agnes.
heading: Adelaide Lead vs Agnes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Adelaide Lead, Victoria and Agnes, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Agnes has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Adelaide Lead (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Adelaide Lead or Agnes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Adelaide Lead has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Agnes scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Adelaide Lead scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Agnes scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Adelaide Lead or Agnes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Agnes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
